---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Orbit
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**Use case**
Describe the problem or workflow this feature would address.

**Proposed solution**
How you'd like it to work.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

**Alignment with design principles**
How does this relate to Orbit's [design principles](https://github.com/orbcli/orbit/blob/main/PRINCIPLES.md)? (Git-nativeness, simplicity, minimal dependencies)
